Class CashierController

java.lang.Object
CashierController
public class CashierController extends Object
Controller class for the Cashier View. Handles user interactions for taking orders, customizing items, and submitting transactions to the database.

  • Constructor Details

    • CashierController

      public CashierController()

  • Method Details

    • initialize

      public void initialize()
      Initializes the controller class. This method is automatically called after the fxml file has been loaded.

    • setupCustomizationButtons

      private void setupCustomizationButtons()
      Sets up event handlers for sweetness and ice level customization buttons.

    • setSweetness

      private void setSweetness(String sweetness)
      Updates the current sweetness level selection.
      Parameters:
      sweetness - The sweetness level string (e.g., "50%")

    • setIceLevel

      private void setIceLevel(String iceLevel)
      Updates the current ice level selection.
      Parameters:
      iceLevel - The ice level string (e.g., "Less")

    • loadMenuButtons

      private void loadMenuButtons()
      Fetches menu items from the database and dynamically creates buttons for them.

    • addToCart

      private void addToCart(int id, String name, double price)
      Adds an item to the cart with the currently selected customization options.
      Parameters:
      id - The database ID of the menu item
      name - The name of the menu item
      price - The price of the menu item

    • clearCart

      private void clearCart()
      Clears the current order cart and resets totals and customizations.

    • checkoutOrder

      private void checkoutOrder()
      Submits the current order to the database. Inserts into 'orders' table first, then 'order_items'.

    • getConnection

      private Connection getConnection() throws SQLException
      Establishes a connection to the database using credentials from dbSetup.
      Returns:
      Connection object
      Throws:
      SQLException - if connection fails
